name: Shooting Quasar Dragon
name_jp: シューティング・クェーサー・ドラゴン
desc:
1 Tuner Synchro Monster + 2+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
Must be Synchro Summoned. Can attack a number of times each Battle Phase, up to the number of non-Tuners used for its Synchro Summon. Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it. When this face-up card leaves the field: You can Special Summon 1 "Shooting Star Dragon" from your Extra Deck.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner Synchro Monster + 2+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
Must be Synchro Summoned. Can attack a number of times each Battle Phase, up to the number of non-Tuners used for its Synchro Summon. Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it. When this face-up card leaves the field: You can Special Summon 1 "Shooting Star Dragon" from your Extra Deck.
eff:
1 Tuner Synchro Monster + 2+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
Must be Synchro Summoned. Can attack a number of times each Battle Phase, up to the number of non-Tuners used for its Synchro Summon. Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it. When this face-up card leaves the field: You can Special Summon 1 "Shooting Star Dragon" from your Extra Deck.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Requires both Tuner and non-Tuner Synchro Monsters as Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
